name: Tamai Steamship Co., Ltd.
summary: Tamai Steamship Co., Ltd. owns and operates ships primarily in Japan. It primarily transports bauxite, alumina, grain, gypsum, blast furnace slag, cement clinker, steel products, etc. The company also provides freight forwarding, manning agency, and real estate services. Tamai Steamship Co., Ltd. was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
